name: Elanor's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Sweet potatoes, cooked and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well. Add salt, nutmeg, milk, and lemon extract to each egg, stirring thoroughly after each addition.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shells.
3. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes.
4. Reduce the temperature to 325°F and bake for an additional 30-40 minutes, or until set.
